## Summary

-

## Checklist

- [ ] Spec is included and up to date (`specs/<ID>-<feature>-spec.md`, with `<ID>=YYYYMMDD-<rand4>`).
- [ ] Any implementation deviations are folded back into the spec (decisions, scope, acceptance criteria, QA notes).
- [ ] QA / Human Review Test Plan in the spec is complete and actionable.
- [ ] Tests added/updated for changed behavior.
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `go build ./...`
